title: Documentation, Change, Lifecycle, and Monitoring · Protocol Clinic: Net Lifecycle Management
summary: Operate a living network source of truth with baselines, telemetry, alerts, configuration, and service ownership. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net lifecycle management increment in an operations and observability runbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Plan EOL, EOS, patches, operating systems, firmware, licensing, replacement, and secure decommissioning.
Use SLAs, service objectives, wireless surveys, and heat maps with date, method, owner, and limitation context.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Predict Net Lifecycle Management
steps.instruction:
theory case — Use a changed theory case for network operations monitoring that tests this competency: defend the module contract. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for plan eol, eos, patches, operating systems, firmware, licensing, replacement, and secure decommissioning.
